_comment: Copy to regions.json and fill after running the calibration tool. Coords are pixels; the values here are the working calibration for Judgment at 1920x1080 (a useful baseline — re-mark if your resolution/layout differs). 'window' makes ROIs relative to the game window's client area; 'monitor' is the mss index used as a fallback. Number ROIs are [left, top, width, height]; card slots use a shared 'corner' size at the [left, top] anchors in 'hole'/'board'.
